column8: The idea for Tetris came from a game the inventor loved.
column9: The coloured blocks are all square in shape.
column10: The game is won when a line of ten blocks is created.
column11: Russian video games are very successful nowadays.
column12: Tetris was named the second best video game in history.
column13: A 19th century Russian tune is heard while the game is played.
column14: Nekrasov wrote several Russian folk songs.
column15: The song and the poem end in the same way.
